script:
#!/bin/bash
set +e
echo '========================================'
echo 'PHASE 6: FINAL SECURITY VALIDATION'
echo '========================================'

echo ''
echo '=== 1. FIREWALL (UFW) ==='
ufw status verbose

echo ''
echo '=== 2. OPEN PORTS (0.0.0.0 only, excluding 127.x) ==='
echo 'These ports are LISTENING on all interfaces:'
ss -tlnp | grep '0.0.0.0' | grep -v '127.0.0' | awk '{print $4, $6}'

echo ''
echo '=== 3. SSH CONFIG ==='
grep -E 'PermitRootLogin|PasswordAuthentication|ChallengeResponseAuthentication' /etc/ssh/sshd_config | grep -v '^#'

echo ''
echo '=== 4. FAIL2BAN ==='
fail2ban-client status 2>/dev/null
fail2ban-client status sshd 2>/dev/null

echo ''
echo '=== 5. DOCKER CONTAINER PORTS ==='
docker ps --format '{{.Names}}: {{.Ports}}' 2>/dev/null

echo ''
echo '=== 6. IPTABLES DOCKER-USER CHAIN ==='
iptables -L DOCKER-USER -n --line-numbers 2>/dev/null

echo ''
echo '=== 7. SERVICES STATUS ==='
for svc in control-bridge webapp vk-callback github-webhook; do
  STATUS=$(systemctl is-active $svc 2>/dev/null || echo 'not-found')
  ENABLED=$(systemctl is-enabled $svc 2>/dev/null || echo 'not-found')
  echo "$svc: active=$STATUS enabled=$ENABLED"
done

echo ''
echo '=== 8. CONTROL-BRIDGE BINDING CHECK ==='
ss -tlnp | grep ':3000 '

echo ''
echo '=== 9. WEBAPP BINDING CHECK ==='
ss -tlnp | grep ':8000 '

echo ''
echo '=== 10. VK-CALLBACK BINDING CHECK ==='
ss -tlnp | grep ':3102 '

echo ''
echo '=== 11. MYSQL EXTERNAL ACCESS TEST ==='
# Try connecting from external perspective — should fail/timeout
timeout 3 bash -c 'echo | nc -w2 127.0.0.1 3306' >/dev/null 2>&1 && echo 'MySQL on localhost: OK (expected)' || echo 'MySQL on localhost: cannot connect'

echo ''
echo '========================================'
echo '         SECURITY SCORECARD'
echo '========================================'

# Calculate score
SCORE=0
MAX=10

# 1. UFW active?
ufw status | grep -q 'Status: active' && { echo '[+] UFW: ACTIVE'; SCORE=$((SCORE+2)); } || echo '[-] UFW: INACTIVE'

# 2. SSH hardened?
grep -q 'PermitRootLogin prohibit-password' /etc/ssh/sshd_config && { echo '[+] SSH: Root login by key only'; SCORE=$((SCORE+1)); } || echo '[-] SSH: Root password login allowed'
grep -q 'PasswordAuthentication no' /etc/ssh/sshd_config && { echo '[+] SSH: Password auth disabled'; SCORE=$((SCORE+1)); } || echo '[-] SSH: Password auth enabled'

# 3. Fail2ban?
systemctl is-active fail2ban >/dev/null 2>&1 && { echo '[+] Fail2ban: RUNNING'; SCORE=$((SCORE+1)); } || echo '[-] Fail2ban: NOT RUNNING'

# 4. MySQL blocked?
iptables -L DOCKER-USER -n 2>/dev/null | grep -q 'dpt:3306.*DROP' && { echo '[+] MySQL 3306: BLOCKED externally'; SCORE=$((SCORE+2)); } || echo '[-] MySQL 3306: EXPOSED'

# 5. WP direct blocked?
iptables -L DOCKER-USER -n 2>/dev/null | grep -q 'dpt:8080.*DROP' && { echo '[+] WordPress 8080: BLOCKED externally'; SCORE=$((SCORE+1)); } || echo '[-] WordPress 8080: EXPOSED'

# 6. Control-bridge on localhost?
ss -tlnp | grep ':3000 ' | grep -q '127.0.0.1' && { echo '[+] Control-bridge: localhost only'; SCORE=$((SCORE+1)); } || echo '[-] Control-bridge: EXPOSED'

# 7. Upload server stopped?
ss -tlnp | grep -q ':9090 ' && echo '[-] Upload server 9090: STILL RUNNING' || { echo '[+] Upload server 9090: STOPPED'; SCORE=$((SCORE+1)); }

echo ''
echo "SECURITY SCORE: $SCORE / $MAX"
if [ $SCORE -ge 8 ]; then
  echo 'STATUS: GOOD (8+/10)'
elif [ $SCORE -ge 6 ]; then
  echo 'STATUS: ACCEPTABLE (6-7/10)'
else
  echo 'STATUS: NEEDS WORK (<6/10)'
fi

echo ''
echo '========================================'
echo 'VALIDATION COMPLETE'
echo '========================================'
intent: Phase 6: Final security validation and scorecard
